form.formComment: Resuming. Finished off last campaign seventh of 10 at Tamworth Bm82 July 18 over 1600m, on heavy track; 6 len behind Rajnish carrying 57kg at $4.80. form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Racing well recently. Returns from a 34-day let-up. Last start 4th of 9 at Goulburn Bm58 on March 10 over 1100m, on a slow track; 5.5 len behind Wandaye carrying 61kg at $3.40. The race before that was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by 3.5 len at Canberra Mdn-Sw February 20 over 1000m defeating Show Rhythm carrying 58.5kg at $2.60. Worth another chance dropping back to 1000m.
